archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (mixed with Archetype 4: Swiss Data Journalism)
design_philosophy: High-visibility, authoritative sports analytics piece. Bloomberg/The Athletic aesthetic. Relies on deep obsidian backgrounds, pure white text for precision, and electric accents for data triggers. Scrollytelling focuses on clear narrative flow tied to visual transformation.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-[5rem] font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-[0.9]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase text-white
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#71717A]

typography.guidelines: Do not use 'Inter' or 'Space Grotesk'. Heavily rely on 'Barlow Condensed' for major structural headings to give it a heavyweight athletic feel. Use 'IBM Plex Mono' for all tooltips, axis labels, and numerical data.

scrollytelling_structure.desktop: grid grid-cols-12 gap-12 relative max-w-screen-2xl mx-auto px-6
scrollytelling_structure.graphic_sticky_container: col-span-12 md:col-span-7 md:sticky top-20 h-[50vh] md:h-[80vh] flex items-center justify-center bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5
scrollytelling_structure.step_card: min-h-[50vh] flex flex-col justify-center mb-[50vh] p-8 bg-[#121215]/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 shadow-2xl

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFCC00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-semibold px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white transition-all duration-300

filters.wrapper: flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-center bg-[#121215] p-4 border border-white/10 w-full
filters.select: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#27272A] text-white text-sm focus:border-[#007AFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF]

tooltips.container: absolute z-50 bg-[#121215] border border-white/20 p-4 shadow-xl pointer-events-none
tooltips.title: text-sm font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider mb-2

scroll_triggers.step_enter: opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100 transition-all duration-700 ease-out
scroll_triggers.step_exit: opacity-30 translate-y-8 scale-95 transition-all duration-700 ease-in

motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all D3/Framer Motion animations.

hero_background.description: College football stadium night scene. Use as the absolute background of the hero section. MUST use a gradient overlay `bg-gradient-to-b from-black/80 via-black/60 to-[#0A0A0A]` to ensure Barlow Condensed headers pop.

texture_overlay.description: Abstract dark texture. Use at 5-10% opacity fixed across the scrollytelling background to eliminate digital flatness.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FRAMEWORK & LIBRARIES: Use React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and D3.js. Shadcn is allowed for forms/filters, but strictly adhere to the 'Performance Pro' color palette and sharp edges.
2. TYPOGRAPHY: Add 'Barlow Condensed', 'Chivo', and 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'IBM Plex Mono' to index.html via Google Fonts. Use them exactly as mapped in the hierarchy.

3. SCROLLYTELLING ENGINE: Use `framer-motion` `useScroll` or `react-intersection-observer` to determine the active step index. Pass this index to the Sticky Chart component to trigger D3 visualizations.

4. D3 + REACT APPROACH: Calculate scales, paths, and positions in React logic (useMemo), but render the SVG elements natively via React (`<motion.rect>`, `<motion.circle>`). This allows Framer Motion to handle smooth layout transitions automatically between scrolly steps.
5. DATA CLEANING FUNNEL: Build a custom waterfall/funnel visualization for the 13k -> 4k row reduction. Animate the discarded rows falling out of the bottom of the container.
6. HOVER STATES & TOOLTIPS: All charts MUST have interactive hover states. Dim non-hovered elements and render an absolutely positioned tooltip containing exact player/team usage numbers.

7. RESPONSIVENESS: On mobile (`max-width: 768px`), reverse the scrollytelling paradigm: make the chart sticky at the TOP of the screen (h-[50vh]), and let the text steps scroll below it. Ensure chart axes scale down gracefully.
8. TESTING: Apply `data-testid` attributes to all filters, buttons, and significant data widgets.
9. ICONS: Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react (already installed), matching the sharp, athletic UI style.
